languages.original_text: {n}With a heavy sigh, Eogunn lowers his hands holding the servo-skull and looks you in the eye.{/n} "Rogue Trader, you know that I have an extremely high opinion of your intellectual abilities and your personal qualities. But you are, nevertheless, a layperson. You have not comprehended the mysteries of the Machine God. You have not studied the esoteric mysteries of communication with machine spirits. You are not versed in the principles of sacred engineering and hermetic augmentation protocols. Nuncius is a one-of-a-kind construct; he cannot be understood simply by looking at—"

languages.text: {n}Эоганн с тяжелым вздохом опускает руки с сервочерепом и смотрит вам в глаза.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, вы знаете, что я крайне высокого мнения о ваших интеллектуальных способностях и личностных качествах. Но вы все еще мирян{mf|ин|ка}. Вы не постигали мистерии Бога-Машины. Вы не изучали эзотерические таинства коммуникации с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g}. Вам не ведомы принципы священной инженерии и герметических протоколов аугментации. Моя вера для вас — непостижимое уравнение. Нунциус — единственный в своем роде конструкт, его нельзя постичь просто заглянув в..."

You are not versed in the principles of sacred engineering and hermetic augmentation protocols. Nuncius is a one-of-a-kind construct; he cannot be understood simply by looking at—"

languages.text: {n}Con un pesado suspiro, Eogunn baja las manos que sostienen al servocráneo y te mira a los ojos.{/n} «Comerciante, usted sabe que tengo en gran estima tanto sus capacidades intelectuales como sus cualidades personales. Sin embargo, sigue siendo un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a}. No ha discernido los misterios del Dios Máquina. No ha estudiado los misterios esotéricos de la comunicación con los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g}. No está versad{mf|o|a} en los principios de la ingeniería sagrada ni los protocolos herméticos de aumento. Nuncius es un constructo único en su especie; no es posible entenderlo a partir de algo tan mundano como...».
languages.original_text: {n}With a heavy sigh, Eogunn lowers his hands holding the servo-skull and looks you in the eye.{/n} "Rogue Trader, you know that I have an extremely high opinion of your intellectual abilities and your personal qualities. You have not studied the esoteric mysteries of communication with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}. Sin embargo, sigue siendo un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a}. No ha discernido los misterios del Dios Máquina. No ha estudiado los misterios esotéricos de la comunicación con los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g}. No está versad{mf|o|a} en los principios de la ingeniería sagrada ni los protocolos herméticos de aumento. Nuncius es un constructo único en su especie; no es posible entenderlo a partir de algo tan mundano como...».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡重重叹了口气，放下托着伺服头骨的手，直视着你的眼睛。{/n}“行商浪人，要知道，我一向对您的智力水平和个人品质评价极高。但您毕竟是教外人士。您并未领悟万机之神的奥秘，没有钻研过与{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通的深奥玄机，也不熟悉神圣工程学的原理和密封植入物协议。努恩修斯是独一无二的构造体，光靠看是无法理解的——”
languages.original_text: {n}With a heavy sigh, Eogunn lowers his hands holding the servo-skull and looks you in the eye.{/n} "Rogue Trader, you know that I have an extremely high opinion of your intellectual abilities and your personal qualities. You have not studied the esoteric mysteries of communication with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}. You are not versed in the principles of sacred engineering and hermetic augmentation protocols. Nuncius is a one-of-a-kind construct; he cannot be understood simply by looking at—"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡重重叹了口气，放下托着伺服头骨的手，直视着你的眼睛。{/n}“行商浪人，要知道，我一向对您的智力水平和个人品质评价极高。但您毕竟是教外人士。您并未领悟万机之神的奥秘，没有钻研过与{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通的深奥玄机，也不熟悉神圣工程学的原理和密封植入物协议。努恩修斯是独一无二的构造体，光靠看是无法理解的——”

languages.text: {n}Avec un lourd soupir, Eogunn abaisse les mains tout en continuant de tenir le servocrâne et vous regarde droit dans les yeux.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, vous savez que je tiens vos capacités intellectuelles et vos qualités personnelles en haute estime. Mais vous n'en restez pas moins {mf|un|une} profane. Vous ne comprenez pas les secrets du Dieu-Machine. Vous n'avez pas étudié les mystères ésotériques de la communication avec les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g}. Vous ne maîtrisez pas les principes de l'ingénierie sacrée et les protocoles d'augmentation hermétique. Nuncius est une création unique en son genre ; pour le comprendre, il ne suffit pas d'observer... »
languages.original_text: {n}With a heavy sigh, Eogunn lowers his hands holding the servo-skull and looks you in the eye.{/n} "Rogue Trader, you know that I have an extremely high opinion of your intellectual abilities and your personal qualities. You have not studied the esoteric mysteries of communication with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}. You are not versed in the principles of sacred engineering and hermetic augmentation protocols. Nuncius is a one-of-a-kind construct; he cannot be understood simply by looking at—"

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec un lourd soupir, Eogunn abaisse les mains tout en continuant de tenir le servocrâne et vous regarde droit dans les yeux.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, vous savez que je tiens vos capacités intellectuelles et vos qualités personnelles en haute estime. Mais vous n'en restez pas moins {mf|un|une} profane. Vous ne comprenez pas les secrets du Dieu-Machine. Vous n'avez pas étudié les mystères ésotériques de la communication avec les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g}. Vous ne maîtrisez pas les principes de l'ingénierie sacrée et les protocoles d'augmentation hermétique. Nuncius est une création unique en son genre ; pour le comprendre, il ne suffit pas d'observer... »

languages.text: {n}Mit einem tiefen Seufzen lässt Eogunn den Servoschädel in seinen Händen sinken und sieht dir in die Augen.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, Ihr wisst, ich habe eine extrem hohe Meinung von Euren intellektuellen Fähigkeiten und Euren persönlichen Qualitäten. Aber Ihr seid dennoch {mf|ein Laie|eine Laiin}. Ihr habt die Mysterien des Maschinengottes nicht begriffen. Ihr habt die esoterischen Mysterien der Kommunikation mit {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeistern{/g} nicht studiert. Ihr seid mit den Prinzipien der heiligen Ingenieurskunst und hermetischen Augmentierungsprotokollen nicht vertraut. Nuncius ist ein einzigartiges Konstrukt. Man kann ihn durch bloße Betrachtung nicht verstehen ..."
languages.original_text: {n}With a heavy sigh, Eogunn lowers his hands holding the servo-skull and looks you in the eye.{/n} "Rogue Trader, you know that I have an extremely high opinion of your intellectual abilities and your personal qualities. Ihr seid mit den Prinzipien der heiligen Ingenieurskunst und hermetischen Augmentierungsprotokollen nicht vertraut. Nuncius ist ein einzigartiges Konstrukt. Man kann ihn durch bloße Betrachtung nicht verstehen ..."

languages.text: {n}重いため息をつきながら、エオガンはサーヴォスカルを持つ手を下ろし、あなたの目を見つめる。{/n}「ローグ・トレーダーよ、私が君の知的能力と人間的資質を非常に高く評価していることは知っているだろう。だが、君は素人だ。機械霊との交信という難解な秘儀を学んだわけでもない。神聖な工学の原理や、密閉された拡張プロトコルに精通しているわけでもない。ヌンキウスは唯一無二の存在であり、見るだけでは理解できない。」
languages.original_text: {n}With a heavy sigh, Eogunn lowers his hands holding the servo-skull and looks you in the eye.{/n} "Rogue Trader, you know that I have an extremely high opinion of your intellectual abilities and your personal qualities. You have not studied the esoteric mysteries of communication with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}. You are not versed in the principles of sacred engineering and hermetic augmentation protocols. Nuncius is a one-of-a-kind construct; he cannot be understood simply by looking at—"

languages.text: {n}Derince iç çeken Eogunn, hizmeleti tutan ellerini indirip gözlerinin içine bakıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, entelektüel yetenekleriniz ve kişisel nitelikleriniz hakkında son derece yüksek bir görüşe sahip olduğumu biliyorsunuz. Ancak yine de ruhban değilsiniz. Makine Tanrı'nın gizemlerini idrak edemediniz. {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Makine ruhlarıyla{/g} iletişimin ezoterik gizemlerini incelemediniz. Kutsal mühendislik ve hermetik ogmentasyon protokollerinin ilkelerine vakıf değilsiniz. Nuncius, türünün tek örneği bir yapıdır. Öyle uzaktan bakarak anlaması müm..."
